## Privacy and Storage Checklist

- [ ] No API keys, passwords, private NAS URLs, real family media, screenshots, APKs, or signing keys are committed.
- [ ] Changes touching synced data are backward-compatible or include a migration plan.
- [ ] AI, NAS/WebDAV, media, and credential changes include a privacy impact note.
